programs.title: Preschool
programs.description: Our mixed-age Preschool classrooms build independence, concentration, and social-emotional growth through hands-on Montessori lessons and uninterrupted work cycles.

images.alt: Educator greeting a child at school

programs.title: Elementary
programs.description: Our Elementary program (K–3rd Grade) extends Montessori learning with advanced literacy, mathematics, science, and collaborative projects that support leadership and critical thinking.
